derive.title: Save apply idle
derive.detail: No staged save request is active for the current mount.
derive.nextStep: Mount a save-eligible cartridge before staging a save request.

derive.title: Save request staged
derive.detail: The browser-side request is staged, but repo-side apply is not trusted until explicit consent and later verification.
derive.nextStep: Grant consent, then hand off the staged request.

derive.title: Save request handed off
derive.detail: A client-side handoff marker exists, but trust still depends on repo-verified response state.
derive.nextStep: Use repo-verified status to confirm whether the bounded write truly landed.

derive.title: Save request stopped
derive.detail: The staged save request is not approved for repo-side write handling.
derive.nextStep: Reset the marker or restage the request before trying again.

guardrails: Apply panel presentation should summarize client-side apply state without claiming repo mutation.
Trusted success still depends on repo-side verification after a bounded write.
Boards remain excluded because Boards never use terminal/saves/.
